title.headline: Topology Becomes the Equalizer
title.subtitle: At scale, both paths run into the same external constraint.

primary.label: GPU Cluster
primary.caption: 50 GB/s between nodes
primary.note: NVLink is fast, but it does not scale to infinity.

secondary.label: CPU Cluster
secondary.caption: 50 GB/s between nodes
secondary.note: The local gap is smaller and the shared floor is identical.

axis.label: Bandwidth ladder
axis.note: Shared interconnect floor for both paths

annotation.label: Equalizer
annotation.note: Ethernet collapses the apparent architectural distance.

floor.note: The network floor is the same constraint both clusters eventually inherit.

thesis.title: Choose the gap you can close.
thesis.line_1: The larger local peak matters less when both systems converge on the same external bottleneck.
thesis.line_2: The better deployment path is the one with the smaller structural mismatch.

summary.conclusion: A good comparison board makes the shared floor and the remaining local gap obvious at a glance.
summary.footer: This is the broader-branch seed for constraint-focused comparison assets.
